Never ending League of Legends, or '''NeL''', was previously a Korean team.
==Overview==
===Season 2===
NeL participated in the first season of [[Azubu The Champions Spring 2012|The Champions]] in spring 2012. They placed third in Group B, behind [[Counter Logic Gaming]] and ahead of [[Team XD]], but did not advance to the bracket.
